catalyst.event: 1H26 interim earnings print testing whether the 26Q1 store-expansion restart translates to revenue acceleration or instead consumes the cost-efficiency margin gains, against unanimously bullish sell-side targets (买入/Overweight from 9 brokers)
catalyst.date_or_window: August 2026 [external estimate, not in our data context; exact announcement date not available in our data]
catalyst.source: TUSHARE broker recommendations cluster (26 reports, 9 brokers, latest 中泰证券 2026-05-03) framing 26Q1 as expansion restart point, making 1H26 the first validation window

rightIf_conditions: 1H26 revenue growth YoY < 5% AND operating margin compresses below 10.0%
Broker EPS revisions begin trending down from current 1.24-1.76 range, with 2+ brokers cutting targets within 2 weeks of 1H26 print
Margin financing balance declines >10% from 2.3亿 in the 30 days post-print (leveraged-long unwind)
Price breaks ¥18.0 chip cluster (16.28% of float) on volume, opening path to ¥17.5 then ¥16.78
Net store-count growth disclosed below 5% YoY (per watchlist wrongIf threshold)
wrongIf_conditions: 1H26 revenue growth YoY ≥6% AND op margin held ≥10.5% — validating dual-drive thesis
Price breaks above ¥19.5 chip cluster on volume, clearing 64% of overhead supply
Management announces share buyback program, signaling cash-flow comfort despite expansion
Same-store sales growth disclosed at >3% YoY — proves expansion is demand-led not cost-only
Broker target upgrades continue with 2+ houses raising targets within 30 days of the print
what_changes_our_mind: 1H26 print showing BOTH revenue growth ≥6% YoY AND operating margin maintained ≥10.5% — proving expansion costs are absorbed without margin compression while top-line re-accelerates
variant_view_one_sentence: Market (9 brokers, 98.8% leveraged-long) believes the 26Q1 store-expansion restart marks Phase 2 of a durable efficiency-then-growth pivot → We believe the +35% NP on +0.2% revenue is one-time margin engineering and restarting capex commits costs ahead of unproven demand → Mechanism is 1H26 earnings revision triggering crowded leveraged-long unwind into thin short base, with chip-cluster overhead at ¥18.0-19.5 capping rallies

predicted_range.low: ¥16.78 (52W low / lowest support per technical agent)
